name: Sins Unforgiven

abilities.name: Unfinished Business
abilities.text: When this model declares the Walk action, it may leave the engagement range of models with an Injustice upgrade without halving its Sp, and is not prevented from declaring the Interact action.

abilities.name: Sins Reflected
abilities.text: When this model ends its activation, it may drain a (soulstone). If it does so, attach an Injustice upgrade to an enemy model within 4".

extraction_notes: Card shows a raven icon at the top center
Background image shows a tormented figure in green lighting
The ability 'Unfinished Business' specifically references Sp (Speed) stat
The ability 'Sins Reflected' uses soulstone drain mechanic
